absorbedContentFamilies: Codex execution, validation, prompt, report, model-routing, and protected-domain policies
product-recovery DATA-series readiness contracts and acceptance snapshots
market overview, scanner, watchlist, liquidity, rotation, options, scenario, backtest, portfolio, and admin domain docs
provider/data reliability, source confidence, quota/cost, WS2/runtime, launch, security/RBAC/MFA, and frontend IA docs
archive reports, task audits, old plans, historical progress logs, and stale acceptance notes
exclusionPolicy: Keep the manual source set intentionally tiny: AGENTS.md, README.md, and docs/DOCS_INDEX.md.
Do not rediscover archive lanes, task reports, stale audits, old plans, or one-off acceptance snapshots as manual sources.
Keep .github and .claude Markdown files as governance/workflow mirrors when required by scripts/check_ai_assets.py, but do not treat them as handbook sources.
Keep issue and PR templates as GitHub workflow assets, not project handbook chapters.
Exclude generated outputs, local evidence, fixture READMEs, language duplicates, broad legacy guides, and dependency/build/cache folders.
When durable knowledge is needed, merge it into this deterministic generator/manual instead of adding another index or archive file.

includedSources.purpose: repository AI-agent rules and hard safety boundaries
includedSources.title: AGENTS.md

includedSources.purpose: human product entrypoint and supported run commands
includedSources.title: WolfyStock

sections.title: Project Identity And Product Purpose
sections.updateTrigger: Product positioning, target audience, or no-advice posture changes.
sections.validation: Docs-only validation plus no-advice grep when user-visible wording changes.

sections.title: Architecture Overview
sections.updateTrigger: Runtime entrypoints, module ownership, public contracts, or high-risk boundary rules change.
sections.validation: Run the focused gate for the touched module plus `python scripts/check_ai_assets.py` for AI-governance edits.

sections.title: Frontend Surfaces
sections.updateTrigger: Route map, page ownership, consumer copy, route IA, or visual system changes.
sections.validation: Frontend tests/lint/build plus browser or screenshot evidence when UI source changes.

sections.title: Backend API And Service Structure
sections.updateTrigger: API families, service boundaries, schema contracts, report payloads, or validation routing changes.
sections.validation: Backend gate or closest pytest/py_compile evidence; wider gates for protected/shared contracts.

sections.title: Data Providers And Data Reality Boundaries
sections.updateTrigger: Provider routing, source authority, data readiness, freshness, lineage, or professional-roadmap changes.
sections.validation: Provider/cache/freshness tests, no-live-call proof when relevant, and raw-provider leakage scans.

sections.title: Market, Options, Macro, Liquidity, Backtest, Scenario, And Portfolio Domains
sections.updateTrigger: Any domain readiness, public copy, protected math/accounting, options authority, or macro/liquidity source change.
sections.validation: Domain-focused tests plus no-advice and leakage checks; never use unrelated green tests as proof.

sections.title: Professional Analytics Roadmap And Readiness
sections.updateTrigger: Professional data roadmap, readiness labels, or evidence-harness expectations change.
sections.validation: Docs/generator validation for handbook changes; domain validation for implementation changes.

sections.title: Protected Domains And Safety Rules
sections.updateTrigger: Any protected boundary or safety policy changes.
sections.validation: Focused tests for the exact protected semantic plus diff/status/secret/no-advice checks before reporting completion.

sections.title: No-Advice Policy
sections.updateTrigger: User-facing research copy, generated reports, product policy, options/backtest/portfolio wording, or no-advice guards change.
sections.validation: Focused grep/classification plus relevant page/report tests.

sections.title: Validation Matrix
sections.updateTrigger: Validation commands, CI gates, protected test expectations, or docs/generator workflow changes.
sections.validation: Run the validation relevant to this manual/generator when edited.

sections.title: Codex Workflow And Landing Changes
sections.updateTrigger: Task modes, git policy, final-report requirements, or AI workflow rules change.
sections.validation: Docs/generator check and `python scripts/check_ai_assets.py` when governance assets change.

sections.title: Current Canonical File Map
sections.updateTrigger: Canonical docs set, retained Markdown policy, or AI asset governance changes.
sections.validation: Inventory before/after counts, link sanity, generator `--check`, and `python scripts/check_ai_assets.py`.

sections.title: Compressed Project History
sections.updateTrigger: Major project direction, docs-retention policy, or historical context changes.
sections.validation: Docs-only validation and inventory count check.

sections.title: AI Onboarding Checklist
sections.updateTrigger: Onboarding order, docs model, or task execution policy changes.
sections.validation: Generator check plus AI asset check.
